name: Sausage Pesto Bites

ingredients.item: english muffins toasted, each slice cut in four
¼ inch thin sliced mozzarella cut into triangles
Italian sausages- casings removed, cooked and cut into ¼ inch slices
little basil leaves for garnish or you can tear the basil

method: Cut toasted English muffin slices into 4 triangles, spread pesto, assemble mozzarella, sausage, little tomato, and basil. Secure with a toothpick. If you like you can add a splash of olive oil on each triangle. Serves 2-3. Olé
